name: Hot N'saucy Turkey Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut off and discard the wing tips.
2. Divide the wings into two pieces; set aside.
3. To prepare the sauce, melt butter in a pan and sauté onion until softened.
4. Add mustard, sugar, vinegar, hot pepper sauce, Worcestershire sauce, ketchup, celery salt, and cayenne to the pan. Stir well.
5. Gradually add 1 1/2 cups of beef broth while stirring continuously.
6. Bring the mixture to a boil, then remove from heat.
7. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining 1/2 cup of beef broth with cornstarch until smooth.
8. Pour the cornstarch mixture back into the sauce and stir gently.
9. Return the sauce to the heat and simmer for 15 minutes.
10. Barbecue the wings over medium heat for 20 to 30 minutes, basting occasionally with the sauce.
11. Continue cooking until tender (approximately 20 more minutes).
12. Makes 4 to 6 servings.
